query:
WITH ranked AS (
                SELECT
                    id,
                    created_at,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                        PARTITION BY model
                        ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
                    ) AS rn
                FROM model_filters
            ),
            eligible AS (
                SELECT id
                FROM ranked
                WHERE rn > $2
                  AND created_at < now() - make_interval(secs => $3)
                ORDER BY id ASC
                LIMIT $1
            )
            DELETE FROM model_filters
            WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM eligible)
